channel.title: GitHub Julia Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Julia in GitHub

item.title: CliMA/ClimaTimeSteppers.jl
item.description: A CPU- and GPU-friendly package for solving ordinary differential equations

item.title: CliMA/Oceananigans.jl
item.description: 🌊 Julia software for fast, friendly, flexible, ocean-flavored fluid dynamics on CPUs and GPUs

item.title: CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl
item.description: ClimaAtmos.jl is a library for building atmospheric circulation models that is designed from the outset to leverage data assimilation and machine learning tools. We welcome contributions!

item.title: JuliaRegistries/General
item.description: The official registry of general Julia packages

item.title: CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl
item.description: ClimaCoupler: bringing atmosphere, land, and ocean together

item.title: CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl
item.description: 🌎 Framework for realistic regional-to-global ocean simulations, and coupled ocean + sea-ice simulations based on Oceananigans and ClimaSeaIce. Basis for the ocean and sea-ice component of CliMA's Earth system model.

item.title: JuliaCI/PkgTemplates.jl
item.description: Create new Julia packages, the easy way

item.title: EnzymeAD/Reactant.jl
item.description: Optimize Julia Functions With MLIR and XLA for High-Performance Execution on CPU, GPU, TPU and more.
